headline: Is Federal Realty’s Leadership Shakeup in the West Altering The Investment Case For Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT)?
summary: In February 2026, Federal Realty Investment Trust appointed long-time West Coast leader Jeff Kreshek as Executive Vice President, Western Region President & Chief Operating Officer, formalizing his oversight of an approximately 8 million-square-foot retail portfolio across California and Arizona. Kreshek’s expanded role, following a track record of driving leasing momentum and operational execution in key Western markets, may shape how investors view Federal Realty’s growth, leadership depth...
